records.searchText: 5da74742ad8ced52be0fe0a5004a99c9d75e29689e00abfaaae68a7af87246d4 tension of dread and relief collisions of emotion, contrast, pressure, and release | abstract variation request 195; target batch count 200 the emotional tone of this artwork embodies the duality of dread and relief, expressed through the contrasting palette of dark violets and soft golds. the dense arrangement of black and dark violet evokes feelings of pressure and tension, mirroring the experience of emotional turmoil. in contrast, pale green and soft gold stripes cut across this darker field #000000 #5b3f8d #ffffff #f1e5b2
